name: My Favorite Ice Box Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the egg and vanilla extract to the mixture; stir until well combined.
3. Fold in the chopped walnuts.
4. Mix in the sifted flour until a dough forms.
5. Shape the dough into one or two rolls and refrigerate until firm.
6. When ready to bake, slice the rolls into thin pieces (about half the thickness of a dime).
7. Bake at 350°F for 4 minutes. Keep an eye on them as they can burn quickly.
8. Let cool for about 30 seconds before removing from the baking sheet.
